foreground.100: Use ONLY on pure white (#ffffff) or transparent backgrounds
foreground.200: Use on any surface that is not pure white (#ffffff), including near-white colored backgrounds

disabled.rule: Do not use a separate token for disabled states. Apply 32% opacity at the layer level.
disabled.avoid: Do not hardcode disabled colors or create disabled-specific tokens.

colors.background.primary.100.$description:
[Intent] Subtle brand background for elements conveying status, category, or selection state
[Usage] Applied to backgrounds of elements indicating selection or active state with brand color

vapor.intent: The subtle primary background to represent status, category, or selection state.
when: background of element visually indicating current selection or active state with brand color
non-interactive element showing status or category with subtle brand emphasis
background of element conveying feedback or notification with brand color
avoid: page or screen background → colors.background.canvas.100
solid action elements background → colors.background.primary.200

colors.background.primary.200.$description:
[Intent] Solid brand background for high-emphasis interactive and brand-colored elements
[Usage] Applied to interactive action elements and visual elements requiring strong brand presence

vapor.intent: The solid primary background for high-emphasis interactive action and brand-colored elements.
when: solid fill background for interactive elements that require brand color emphasis
brand color fill for non-interactive visual elements requiring strong brand presence
avoid: page or screen background → colors.background.canvas.100
status or category label background → colors.background.primary.100

colors.background.contrast.100.$description:
[Intent] Subtle contrasting background to draw attention to informational content
[Usage] Applied to non-interactive elements requiring intentional visual contrast against the page

vapor.intent: The subtle contrast background to intentionally draw attention to content by contrasting with the surrounding page surface.
when: background of non-interactive element requiring intentional visual contrast against the page
background of informational element that must stand out from the surrounding content
avoid: elements requiring stronger visual separation → colors.background.contrast.200

colors.background.contrast.200.$description:
[Intent] Solid high-emphasis background for elements requiring strong visual separation
[Usage] Applied to elements that must be visually distinct from all surrounding content

vapor.intent: The solid high-emphasis background for elements requiring strong visual separation from the surrounding UI.
when: background of element that must be visually distinct from all surrounding content
high-emphasis background for elements requiring immediate user attention
background of elements providing temporary or contextual information above the page layer
avoid: elements requiring only subtle contrast → colors.background.contrast.100
interactive variant-specific backgrounds → use variant-specific background tokens

colors.background.canvas.100.$description:
[Intent] Base-level surface background for pages and bordered components
[Usage] Applied as the default page background and base surface for components with visible borders

vapor.intent: The base-level canvas background for pages and bordered components.
when: default background of all pages or screens
base surface background for components with visible borders
avoid: elevated surfaces such as sidebar or panel background → colors.background.canvas.200

colors.background.canvas.200.$description:
[Intent] Secondary canvas background to differentiate background regions within a page
[Usage] Applied to layout regions requiring visual separation from the primary canvas

vapor.intent: The solid secondary canvas background to differentiate background regions within a page.
when: secondary page-level background area that needs visual separation from the primary canvas
layout region requiring a subtle distinction between background layers without component-level context
avoid: direct use as a component background → colors.background.secondary.200
primary page background → colors.background.canvas.100

colors.foreground.primary.100.$description:
[Intent] Subtle brand foreground for text and icons on white or transparent surfaces
[Usage] Applied to brand-colored text or icons placed on white or transparent backgrounds

vapor.intent: The subtle primary foreground for brand-colored text and icons on white or transparent surfaces.
when: brand-colored text or icon on white or transparent background
subtle brand emphasis without a colored background
avoid: use on canvas.200 or surfaces with non-white background color → colors.foreground.primary.200

colors.foreground.primary.200.$description:
[Intent] Solid brand foreground for text and icons on colored background surfaces
[Usage] Applied to brand-colored text or icons on canvas.200 or non-white backgrounds

vapor.intent: The solid primary foreground for brand-colored text and icons on colored background surfaces.
when: brand-colored text or icon on canvas.200 or a surface with non-white background color
strong brand emphasis on a colored background surface
avoid: use on white or transparent background → colors.foreground.primary.100

colors.foreground.inverse.$description:
[Intent] Inverse foreground for text and icons on dark backgrounds
[Usage] Applied to text or icons where white ensures sufficient contrast against the background

vapor.intent: The inverse foreground for text and icons on backgrounds where white ensures sufficient contrast.
when: text or icon on backgrounds where white provides sufficient contrast against the background color
avoid: light or pale backgrounds where dark text provides better readability → use contextual foreground tokens

colors.foreground.danger.100.$description:
[Intent] Subtle danger foreground for destructive actions or error states
[Usage] Applied to text or icons indicating irreversible actions or error messages on white backgrounds

vapor.intent: The subtle danger foreground for text and icons indicating destructive actions or error states.
when: text or icon indicating a destructive or irreversible action such as deletion
error message text or icon requiring user attention
avoid: cautionary actions that do not involve danger → colors.foreground.warning.100

colors.foreground.danger.200.$description:
[Intent] Solid danger foreground for destructive actions or error states on colored surfaces
[Usage] Applied to text or icons indicating irreversible actions or error messages on non-white backgrounds

vapor.intent: The solid danger foreground for text and icons indicating destructive actions or error states on colored background surfaces.
when: text or icon indicating a destructive or irreversible action on a non-white background
error message text or icon on canvas.200 or tinted surface
avoid: use on white or transparent background → colors.foreground.danger.100
cautionary actions that do not involve danger → colors.foreground.warning.200

colors.foreground.hint.100.$description:
[Intent] Subtle hint foreground for supplementary text and icons with low emphasis
[Usage] Applied to placeholder text, helper text, or low-emphasis icons on white or transparent backgrounds

vapor.intent: The subtle hint foreground for text and icons in supplementary contexts where low emphasis is intended.
when: text or icon in an empty or inactive state requiring minimal visual weight
supplementary or helper text that needs to be perceived but not emphasized
low-emphasis icon in a non-interactive context
avoid: elements requiring emphasis → colors.foreground.normal.100 or colors.foreground.primary.100
selected or active state text → colors.foreground.normal.100 or colors.foreground.primary.100

colors.foreground.hint.200.$description:
[Intent] Solid hint foreground for supplementary text and icons on colored surfaces
[Usage] Applied to placeholder text or low-emphasis icons on canvas.200 or non-white backgrounds

vapor.intent: The solid hint foreground for text and icons in supplementary contexts on colored background surfaces.
when: placeholder or supplementary text on non-white or colored background
low-emphasis text or icon on canvas.200 or tinted surface
avoid: elements requiring emphasis → colors.foreground.normal.200 or colors.foreground.primary.200
selected or active state text → colors.foreground.normal.200 or colors.foreground.primary.200

colors.foreground.normal.100.$description:
[Intent] Subtle neutral foreground for essential text and icons without brand color
[Usage] Applied to default body text, labels, and icons on white or transparent backgrounds

vapor.intent: The subtle normal foreground for default text and icons that users must perceive without brand color emphasis.
when: default body text or label on white or transparent background
essential text or icon that requires clear readability without brand color
primary content text where neutral emphasis is sufficient
avoid: supplementary or low-emphasis text → colors.foreground.hint.100
brand-colored emphasis text → colors.foreground.primary.100
highest-hierarchy title or heading requiring maximum visual prominence → colors.foreground.contrast.100

colors.foreground.normal.200.$description:
[Intent] Solid neutral foreground for essential text and icons on colored surfaces
[Usage] Applied to default body text, labels, and icons on canvas.200 or non-white backgrounds

vapor.intent: The solid normal foreground for default text and icons that users must perceive on colored background surfaces.
when: default body text or label on canvas.200 or non-white background
essential text or icon requiring clear readability on a colored surface
avoid: supplementary or low-emphasis text → colors.foreground.hint.200
brand-colored emphasis text → colors.foreground.primary.200

colors.border.normal.$description:
[Intent] Base border for default outlines and structural boundaries
[Usage] Applied to standard component borders and separators between content areas

vapor.intent: The base border for default outlines and structural boundaries of UI elements.
when: default border for standard UI elements requiring a subtle structural boundary
divider or separator between content areas that need visual separation without emphasis
avoid: borders conveying interactive variant styles → use variant-specific border tokens (colors.border.primary, colors.border.secondary, colors.border.contrast)

colors.border.contrast.$description:
[Intent] High-contrast border for focused states and contrast-level outline styles
[Usage] Applied to non-text-input interactive elements in focused state and contrast outline styles

vapor.intent: The base high-contrast border for focused states and contrast-level outline styles.
when: border of non-text-input interactive elements such as select, button in focused state via interaction layer
border of UI elements requiring high contrast outline style
avoid: focused state border of input-type elements → colors.border.primary
non-contrast variant outline styles → use variant-specific border tokens (colors.border.primary, colors.border.secondary)

colors.border.primary.$description:
[Intent] Primary brand border for focused states of text input elements
[Usage] Applied to text input and textarea elements in focused state

vapor.intent: The base primary border for focused states of input-type interactive elements.
when: border of text input or textarea elements in focused state
avoid: focused state of non-input interactive elements → colors.border.contrast
default (unfocused) border of input elements → colors.border.normal

colors.border.secondary.$description:
[Intent] Secondary border for supplementary UI boundaries
[Usage] Applied to borders conveying secondary-level emphasis alongside primary elements

vapor.intent: The base secondary border for UI elements requiring supplementary boundary emphasis.
when: border of elements serving a secondary role alongside primary interactive elements

colors.border.success.$description:
[Intent] Success border for positive outcomes and completion states
[Usage] Applied to borders indicating successful or completed actions

vapor.intent: The base success border for elements indicating positive or completed states.
when: border of element indicating a successful or completed action
border conveying a positive result to the user
avoid: primary action elements → colors.border.primary
elements used alongside primary elements → colors.border.secondary

colors.border.warning.$description:
[Intent] Warning border for cautionary actions requiring careful user decision
[Usage] Applied to borders indicating actions that require user caution

vapor.intent: The base warning border for elements requiring cautious user decision.
when: border of element indicating an action that requires careful consideration
border conveying a cautionary state to guide deliberate user decision
avoid: irreversible or destructive actions → colors.border.danger

colors.border.hint.$description:
[Intent] Hint border that visually implies interactive affordance
[Usage] Applied to borders that communicate clickable or tappable interaction to users

vapor.intent: The base hint border for elements that visually imply clickable or tappable interaction.
when: border of element that visually implies clickable or tappable interaction
avoid: non-interactive elements → colors.border.normal

colors.foreground.secondary.100.$description:
[Intent] Subtle secondary foreground for text and icons with supplementary emphasis
[Usage] Applied to text or icons serving a secondary role alongside primary elements on white or transparent backgrounds

vapor.intent: The subtle secondary foreground for text and icons with supplementary emphasis.
when: text or icon with lower visual hierarchy than the primary content on the same surface
supplementary or descriptive text supporting a higher-hierarchy text element
avoid: standalone elements requiring visibility without primary context → colors.foreground.contrast.100

colors.foreground.secondary.200.$description:
[Intent] Solid secondary foreground for text and icons with supplementary emphasis on colored surfaces
[Usage] Applied to text or icons serving a secondary role alongside primary elements on non-white backgrounds

vapor.intent: The solid secondary foreground for text and icons with supplementary emphasis on colored surfaces.
when: text or icon with lower visual hierarchy than the primary content on a non-white background
supplementary or descriptive text supporting a higher-hierarchy text element on canvas.200 or tinted surface
avoid: standalone elements requiring visibility without primary context → colors.foreground.contrast.200

[Usage] Applied to text or icons conveying successful or completed states on white or transparent backgrounds

positive feedback or confirmation message text or icon

vapor.intent: The solid success foreground for text and icons indicating positive or completed states on colored surfaces.

colors.foreground.warning.100.$description:
[Intent] Subtle warning foreground for text and icons requiring cautious user decision
[Usage] Applied to text or icons conveying cautionary states on white or transparent backgrounds

vapor.intent: The subtle warning foreground for text and icons requiring cautious user decision.
when: text or icon indicating an action that requires careful consideration on white or transparent background
cautionary message text or icon guiding deliberate user decision

colors.foreground.warning.200.$description:

[Usage] Applied to text or icons conveying cautionary states on non-white backgrounds

vapor.intent: The solid warning foreground for text and icons requiring cautious user decision on colored surfaces.
when: text or icon indicating an action that requires careful consideration on canvas.200 or non-white background
cautionary message text or icon on colored surface
avoid: irreversible or destructive actions → colors.foreground.danger.200

colors.foreground.contrast.100.$description:
[Intent] Subtle contrast foreground for standalone text and icons requiring visibility without primary context
[Usage] Applied to text or icons that must stand out independently on white or transparent backgrounds

vapor.intent: The subtle contrast foreground for text and icons requiring visibility without primary context.
when: highest-hierarchy title or heading text requiring maximum visual prominence on the page
text or icon requiring clear visibility without accompanying primary-colored elements on white or transparent background

colors.foreground.contrast.200.$description:
[Intent] Solid contrast foreground for standalone text and icons requiring visibility on colored surfaces
[Usage] Applied to text or icons that must stand out independently on non-white backgrounds
